3: Welcome! I know you may have reservations about our plan to infiltrate the Passage of the Unbound, but I promise you, your actions could save countless lives!

4: Welcome! If there are any details you'd like to confirm about the Passage of the Unbound's wicked plan, I should be glad to share all I can.

5: Well, if it isn't my favorite customer! Thanks to you, the world is free from the Passage of the Unbound's villainy. If there's anything I can do for you, you need only say the word!

15: Thanks to your efforts, the five leaders of the Passage of the Unbound are in custody. But so long as the founder Apyaahi remains free, there is the danger she might rebuild and plot again.

16: By infiltrating her organization, you may be able to uncover her future schemes before they come to fruition, thereby allowing us to prevent further suffering!

17: Thank goodness you uncovered Apyaahi's plot to attack Tuliyollal! If only we had more definite details, we might better prepare...

18:
あなたが組織に潜入して得た情報によると、
アパーヒの次なる攻撃目標はトライヨラだとか！

19: With not only her enforcers but now an army of beasts under her command, the fighting will be fierce. Thankfully, the Landsguard have pledged their help! Please, strike back together and drive the Passage of the Unbound from our home!

20: Tuliyollal is safe, and we have you and our dear allies to thank for it! You're welcome to all the tacos your stomach can hold!

21:
首領に加え、残党である幹部2期生たちも無事に逮捕されました。
これでホントのホントに「自由の扉」は壊滅、
安心して旅を続けていただいて大丈夫ですよ！

26: If Apyaahi is to be believed, the treasures were created by an individual of the Yok Huy. Luckily, it seems she possesses the last one, so if you can bring her down, we need no longer fear that they will be misused!

27: If Apyaahi is to be believed, the treasures were created by a Yok Huy calling himself the Wise One. And now that hers has been destroyed, we need no longer fear that they will be misused!

32: The Landsguard told me why Apyaahi founded her villainous organization. And what a story it is...a trivial, ridiculous story.

33: Thankfully, without the treasures to rely upon, the Passage of the Unbound has no teeth. No doubt the authorities of nations across the star will root out the remaining members─though I expect the organization will fade into obscurity soon enough regardless.

34: ...Or so I had thought, until more leaders gathered in this very place!

35: Fortunately, they were apprehended almost immediately. Never again shall that abominable group trouble us... Never!
